name: ILI9341.Device

documentation.description:
See the "a-Si TFT LCD Single Chip Driver" specification by ILITEK, file
name "ILI9341_DS_V1.02" for details.

simple_types.name: Orientations
simple_types.code:
type Orientations is
  (Portrait_1,
   Portrait_2,
   Landscape_1,
   Landscape_2);

enumeration_literals.name: Portrait_1
enumeration_literals.description: origin at lower right, text going right to left

enumeration_literals.name: Portrait_2
enumeration_literals.description: origin at upper left, text going left to right

enumeration_literals.name: Landscape_1
enumeration_literals.description: origin at lower left, text going up

enumeration_literals.name: Landscape_2
enumeration_literals.description: origin at upper right, text going down

tagged_types.name: ILI9341_Device
tagged_types.code: type ILI9341_Device is tagged limited private;

subprograms.name: Initialize

documentation.description:
Initializes the device. Afterward, the device is also enabled so there
is no immediate need to call Enable_Display.

subprograms.name: Set_Orientation

documentation.description: The method of connection to ILI9341
The abstraction of the transport to ILI9341 chip

formals.name: Send_Command

documentation.description: Send an ILI9341 command and corresponding arguments if any
